requirements: Implement complete user registration and security functionality

user registration and security data persists correctly across sessions

FR-01.title: Build User Registration and Security API
FR-01.description: Create REST API endpoints for user registration and security feature in Personal Finance and Budgeting App. Implement business logic, validation, database operations, and error handling. Add authentication and authorization checks.

FR-01.title: Build User Registration and Security UI
FR-01.description: Create user interface components for user registration and security. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.

FR-01.title: Write User Registration and Security Tests
FR-01.description: Write unit and integration tests for user registration and security feature. Cover happy path, error cases, edge cases, and validation rules. Achieve minimum 80% coverage.
